summary: What does it take to stay invested in equity for three generations? In this powerful conversation, CA Anuj Jain, Co-Founder of Green Portfolio, shares why his family has trusted equities over every other asset class, from gold to real estate, and how long-term conviction builds real wealth.

seo.title: Why My Family Has Stayed 100% in Equity | CA Anuj Jain
seo.description: What does it take to stay invested in equity for three generations? In this powerful conversation, CA Anuj Jain, Co-Founder of Green Portfolio, shares why

takeaways: CA Anuj Jain's family has stayed in equity across three generations, choosing stocks over gold and real estate as their long-term path to building wealth.
The conversation separates volatility from risk, arguing that understanding what you own matters more than trying to avoid the ups and downs.
Even largecaps can be risky if you do not actually understand the business behind the stock.
It walks through how to think about smallcaps, Portfolio Management Services and mutual funds, alongside promoter ethics, red flags and balance sheet discipline.
The through-line is that equity investing is about temperament, not timing.
